case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INVESTIGATION UNIT VS RAYGOZA, MARTHA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, JORGE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MARHA/JORGE RAYGOZA RETURNED -UNABLE TO DELIVER AS ADDRESSED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  INVESTIGATION UNIT AS TO DEFENDANT RAYGOZA, MARTHA RAYGOZA, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-07-2002, GRANTED

NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN TO SENDER.

NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT REMAILED TO JORGE RAYGOZA.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-14-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-14-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
